title: How Big Youtubers Grow Their Audience

transcript.text: IShowSpeed went from no audience whatsoever to 50 million subscribers. When you look closely [music] at each of these creators and how they built their channels into empires, a pattern emerges. [music] And this pattern, to some extent, shows up on every successful YouTube channel there is. And it's called primal branding. Now, what is primal branding? [music] It is a framework developed by Patrick Hanlon that treats brands as belief systems rather than merely products. [music] It is designed to build communities and cultivate a passionate followers. So, in the music world, think [music] Swifties. And in the YouTube world, think PewDiePie and his bro army back in the day. That level of loyalty is not an accident.
